1.Instrument cluster panel brightness does not adjust either too dim or too bright  Mazda dealer stated no failures were found twice same responded.  2. Lane Keep Assist this feature never worked even on the straight road  since I bought July      2022. Mazda doesn't have a capab

The windshield wiper sprayers don't work properly when it gets significantly below freezing. This is incredibly dangerous on highways where it snows and the roads are salted, allowing for the snow to be thrown up as mud. This ends up in the windshield wipers just spreading mud al

My wife has a cold. She picked it up during several uncomfortable hours in the emergency room. Our driveway is on a bit of a slope. She stopped the car, put it in park (she thought), turned off the engine, and got out. Something in the dashboard compartment had blocked the shift

narrative.headline: 2022 Mazda CX-9: only a handful of complaints, spread across several areas
narrative.summary: Owners filed just 9 complaints with NHTSA, so no single problem dominates. Three areas tie for the top spot at 2 reports each (22%): the electrical system, the body structure, and the exterior lighting. The wipers and the brakes each drew one report. No fires and no deaths are reported. The one brake complaint is the only one tied to a crash, and it also caused an injury, so the brakes are worth a close look despite the small count.
